CREATE TABLE test_or (id INT, flag1 BOOLEAN, flag2 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_or VALUES (1, true, false);
INSERT INTO test_or VALUES (2, false, true);
INSERT INTO test_or VALUES (3, false, false);
INSERT INTO test_or VALUES (4, true, true);
SELECT "or"(flag1, flag2) FROM test_or WHERE id = 1;
SELECT "or"(flag1, flag2) FROM test_or WHERE id IN (2, 3);
SELECT id, "or"(flag1, (SELECT flag2 FROM test_or WHERE id = 4)) AS result FROM test_or;
SELECT id, "or"((SELECT flag1 FROM test_or WHERE id = 1), flag2) AS result FROM test_or WHERE id = 2;
SELECT t1.id, "or"(t1.flag1, t2.flag2) AS joint_result FROM test_or t1 JOIN test_or t2 ON t1.id < t2.id;
SELECT "or"(flag1, (SELECT DISTINCT flag2 FROM test_or WHERE flag1 = true)) FROM test_or WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id FROM test_or WHERE "or"(flag1, flag2) = true;
SELECT "or"(flag1, NOT flag2) AS inverted_result FROM test_or WHERE flag1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_or WHERE "or"(flag1, flag2) AND id > 2;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_or WHERE "or"(flag1, flag2) = true;
